name: Candy Shop Cookie Pizza (Crisp)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Semi sweet chocolate morsels, divided
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Lightly grease a 12-inch pizza pan or a 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
In a large mixing bowl, beat butter until creamy. Gradually add sugars and beat until combined.
Beat in egg and vanilla. Gradually beat in the flour mixture.
Stir in 1 cup of chocolate morsels.
Using buttered wax paper, spread the dough evenly in the prepared pan.
Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned. Leave in the pizza pan.
Immediately sprinkle the remaining 1 cup of morsels over the crust. Let stand five minutes, or until the morsels become soft and shiny.
Gently spread chocolate evenly over the crust. Let set.
(Optional) If desired, when the cookie comes out of the oven, sprinkle one cup of morsels on the hot crust. Drop peanut butter by spoonfuls on top of the morsels. Let stand five minutes, or until the morsels become soft and shiny.
Gently spread chocolate and peanut butter evenly over the crust.
Let cool completely before serving.
